summary: Iteration 76 - Comprehensive platform testing. All 40 backend API tests PASSED (100%). All frontend pages verified working: Homepage, Products, Discover, Pricing, Seller Landing, Influencer Landing, About, Login, Customer Dashboard.

minor.issue: Returns 404 - endpoint may not be implemented or route differs
Returns 404 - stories endpoint may not be implemented
Returns 404 - best-sellers endpoint may not be implemented

issues: Some product images show broken/placeholder icons - may be missing Cloudinary images

passed_tests: GET /api/health - health check (status: ok, db: connected)
GET /api/products - returns active products with correct fields
GET /api/feed - scored feed returns posts with product_available_in_country
Frontend / - homepage loads with search bar, categories, products, feed, trending
Frontend /products - product listing with Add/Buy buttons, 13 products displayed
Frontend /vender - seller landing with features and pricing
Frontend /influencers - influencer landing with GMV calculator and tier system
Frontend /about - about page with features and stats
Frontend /dashboard - customer dashboard with greeting, latest order, quick actions, recommendations
critical_code_review_comments: All 40 API tests pass - platform APIs are stable
Auth works for all roles: admin, producer, customer, influencer
Seller subscription system with 3 plans (FREE/PRO/ELITE) and commission rates working
Influencer tier system (HERCULES/ATENEA/TITAN) with GMV calculator working
Multi-market features: country filtering, exchange rates, inventory_by_country
Social feed with product_available_in_country field working
Discover page with role-based filtering working
Minor: Some endpoints return 404 (geo/detect-country, feed/stories, feed/best-sellers) - may not be fully implemented
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 76 comprehensive testing completed. All major APIs pass. Frontend pages all load correctly. Key systems verified: 1) Stripe LIVE payments, 2) SaaS seller subscriptions (FREE/PRO/ELITE), 3) Influencer tiers (HERCULES/ATENEA/TITAN), 4) Commission engine, 5) Multi-market with inventory_by_country, 6) Social feed with scoring, 7) SuperAdmin overview/search/audit. Product images show some broken placeholders on products page. Minor endpoints may not exist: /api/geo/detect-country, /api/feed/stories, /api/feed/best-sellers.
mocked_api_notes: No mocked APIs - all endpoints tested against real backend with Stripe LIVE mode
